summary: Testing new features: chapter 70/71 search with SEN tariff data, dark theme with gold/copper accents, country names display with flags. All features working correctly.

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All UI features verified via Playwright

context_for_next_testing_agent: Smart search for chapters 70 and 71 with SEN country_code working correctly. Backend API uses 'query' param not 'q'. Dark theme colors verified in UI: bg-[#1B232C], text-[#D4AF37] for gold, text-[#A78BFA] for purple sub-positions, text-[#F5F5F5] for white.

chapter_70_search_sen.details: GET /api/hs6/smart-search?query=70&country_code=SEN returns 20 results with Verre/Glass codes (700100, 700210, etc.)

chapter_71_search_sen.details: GET /api/hs6/smart-search?query=71&country_code=SEN returns 20 results with Perles/pierres précieuses codes (710110, 710121, etc.)

dark_theme_dropdown.details: Search results dropdown has dark background (bg-[#1B232C]), gold border accents, visible in screenshots

hs_codes_gold_text.details: HS6 codes (700100, 710110) displayed in gold (#D4AF37) with bg-[rgba(212,175,55,0.15)]

white_text_descriptions.details: Descriptions displayed in white (#F5F5F5) on dark background, verified in screenshots

country_names_with_flags.details: Partner country Select shows country names with flag emojis (e.g., 🇸🇳 Sénégal)

sub_positions_purple_styling.details: Sub-positions (7001001000, etc.) displayed in purple (#A78BFA) with purple border accents

dd_rates_in_badges.details: DD rates shown as badges (DD: 20%, DD: 35%) with gold background

authentic_tariff_data.details: Results include from_authentic: true, indicating real SEN tariff data is used

chapter_header_display.details: Chapter header shows with icon and full title: 📦 Chapitre 70: Verre et ouvrages
